from dotenv import load_dotenv
import os, requests, jwt, uuid, hashlib
from urllib.parse import urlencode

load_dotenv\(\)
access = os.getenv\('UPBIT_ACCESS_KEY'\)
secret = os.getenv\('UPBIT_SECRET_KEY'\)

payload = {'access_key': access, 'nonce': str\(uuid.uuid4\(\)\)}
jwt_token = jwt.encode\(payload, secret, algorithm='HS256'\)
headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {jwt_token}'}

resp = requests.get\('https://api.upbit.com/v1/accounts', headers=headers\)
print\('상태코드:', resp.status_code\)
print\('응답:', resp.text[:500]\)
" 2>&1)

import ast, sys

files = [
    'main.py',
    'src/api/upbit_client.py',
    'src/strategies/volatility_breakout.py',
]
ok = True
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\) as fp:
            ast.parse\(fp.read\(\)\)
        print\(f'OK  {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'ERR {f}: {e}'\)
        ok = False
sys.exit\(0 if ok else 1\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/c/Users/조창우/Desktop/Changwoo/Project/upbit-quant" && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 .venv/Scripts/python -c "
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)

# 전략 로직만 단독 테스트
from src.strategies.volatility_breakout import calculate_target_price, should_buy
from src.api.upbit_client import get_current_price

coins = ['KRW-BTC', 'KRW-ETH', 'KRW-XRP']
print\('=== 현재 매수 조건 점검 ==='\)
for ticker in coins:
    target = calculate_target_price\(ticker\)
    current = get_current_price\(ticker\)
    if target and current:
        signal = '매수 신호!' if current >= target else '대기 중'
        print\(f'{ticker}: 현재가 {current:,.0f} / 목표가 {target:,.0f} → {signal}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/c/Users/조창우/Desktop/Changwoo/Project/upbit-quant" && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 .venv/Scripts/python -c "
import ast, os

check = [
    'notify/telegram_bot.py',
    'notify/daily_report.py',
    'backtest/engine.py',
    'backtest/report.py',
    'backtest/strategies/volatility_breakout.py',
    'backtest/strategies/dual_momentum.py',
    'backtest/strategies/rsi_bollinger.py',
    'backtest/strategies/ma_cross.py',
    'config/settings.yaml',  # yaml은 건너뜀
]
for f in check:
    if not f.endswith\('.py'\):
        print\(f'SKIP {f}'\)
        continue
    try:
        with open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\) as fp:
            ast.parse\(fp.read\(\)\)
        print\(f'OK   {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'ERR  {f}: {e}'\)
" 2>&1)
